title: The Big Bang Of AI Just Happened: Cosmos 3
summary: NVIDIA launched Cosmos 3, a world model trained on video, audio, text, and action data for physical AI applications. Cosmos 3 is part of NVIDIA's full physical AI stack that includes Vera and the Isaac GR00T humanoid robot platform.
